calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-30-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
